title: Cross Road Blues
album: King Of The Delta Blues Singers
why_this_song: Cross Road Blues by Robert Johnson (1936) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I went to the crossroad, fell down on my knees"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Ooh, standin' at the crossroad, I tried to flag a ride"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Ooh, the sun goin' down boy, dark goin' catch me here"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I went to the crossroad, fell down on my knees"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I went to the crossroad, fell down on my knees"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "crossroad" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "crossroad" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "standin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "standin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Cross Road Blues" was released in 1936. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Cross Road Blues" foi lançada em 1936. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Cross Road Blues" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Cross Road Blues" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
